theme_archetype.description: Premium, image-driven luxury hospitality brand experience. Aspirational, emotional, editorial storytelling.

design_principles: Less boxes, less cards, less grids, less visible section boundaries.
Continuous visual journey, smooth scrolling, generous whitespace.
Cinematic full-bleed imagery and large editorial layouts.
Elegant, thin typography with high contrast.

headings.usage: Large, elegant, thin-to-medium weights for all major section titles. No bold/heavy headlines.

spacing_and_layout.padding: py-24 md:py-32 lg:py-40 for major sections to ensure generous whitespace.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl to rounded-[2rem] for large cinematic imagery.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Asymmetric, bento-style editorial layouts. Avoid equal-width columns. Use overlapping layers.

components_and_sections.name: Header
components_and_sections.layout: Left: Hamburger + Menu text. Center: Brand Logo. Right: Pill buttons (Brochure, Plan, Contact Us in champagne).
components_and_sections.behavior: Option 1 reference. Transparent with white SVGs on hero, transitions to white background with gold SVGs on scroll.

components_and_sections.name: 1. Hero
components_and_sections.content: Full-screen immersive image, 'Elevate Your View / Luxury Residences in Grosvenor Heights'. Minimal text.
components_and_sections.style: Text reveal, fade-up, gentle parallax. Minimal overlay (max bg-black/30) to let image shine.

components_and_sections.name: 2. The View
components_and_sections.content: Large full-width imagery, minimal copy ('Wake Up Above Kingston', 'Elevated Living. Uninterrupted Views.'). No paragraphs.

components_and_sections.name: 3. Lifestyle
components_and_sections.content: Themes: Privacy, Elevation, Modern Living, Views, Convenience. Minimal text.
components_and_sections.style: Editorial layout, large imagery + oversized typography overlapping.

components_and_sections.name: 4. Amenities Experience
components_and_sections.content: Infinity Pool, Fitness Centre, Rooftop Spaces, Landscaped Grounds, 24/7 Security.
components_and_sections.style: Immersive scrolling. Each amenity reveals individually via large imagery. NO icon grids/boxes.

components_and_sections.name: 5. Full-Width Visual Moment
components_and_sections.content: Large panoramic image, minimal text overlay, pure emotional pause.

components_and_sections.name: 6. Residences
components_and_sections.content: Organize by SIZE ('From 1,671 sq ft', 'From 2,322 sq ft', 'Signature Penthouses'). Hover/click reveals square footage, price USD, availability.
components_and_sections.style: Premium, image-focused, no spreadsheet on homepage. Smooth hover reveals.

components_and_sections.name: 7. Location Preview
components_and_sections.content: Perfectly Positioned in Grosvenor Heights, Kingston, Jamaica. CTAs: Get Directions, Explore Location. Google Maps embed.
components_and_sections.style: Clean, minimal. No long neighborhood lists.

components_and_sections.name: 8. Gallery Preview
components_and_sections.content: FEEL THIS LUXURY 01/12 with circular arrow buttons.
components_and_sections.style: Luxury editorial gallery, large images, horizontal scroll, subtle animation, magazine-inspired.

components_and_sections.name: 9. Final CTA
components_and_sections.content: Ready to Elevate Your View? CTAs: Book a Visit, Download Brochure.
components_and_sections.style: Strong emotional ending, large image, minimal copy.

components_and_sections.name: Floating Action Button (FAB)
components_and_sections.content: One champagne-gold circular FAB bottom-right. Expands into: Download Brochure, Book a Visit, WhatsApp.
components_and_sections.style: Replaces left rail and old WhatsApp button. Primary conversion tool, visible throughout.

framer_motion_patterns: Fade-up reveals for typography (y: 20, opacity: 0 to 1, duration: 0.8, ease: easeOut).
Image masking reveals (clip-path or scale from 1.1 to 1.0 with overflow hidden).
Scroll-triggered transitions and gentle parallax for large images.
animations.restrictions: Avoid bouncing, fast, gimmicky, or excessive motion. Defer non-critical animations for performance.

hard_rules: NEVER mention bedrooms, bathrooms, floor plans, construction timelines, or 'near completion'.
Use existing brand SVG logo set.
Residences shown by SIZE in SQUARE FEET (do not convert).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
Avoid generic AI layouts, heavy cards, thick typography, large blue sections.

testing_guidelines.data_testid: Add data-testid attributes to all buttons, links, form inputs, and FAB.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use this JSON as the absolute source of truth for the Grosvenor Vistas redesign. Ensure the color tokens strictly use the defined warm palette with Grosvenor Blue ONLY as an accent. Implement the defined font stack (Cormorant Garamond + Signika). Respect all hard content rules regarding property details. Construct the UI using raw HTML/Tailwind for the editorial sections, and Shadcn ONLY for complex interactive elements (like the FAB dropdown or forms). Ensure responsive mobile-first implementation with performance-focused lazy loading. Apply data-testid to all interactive and key informational elements.
